metadata.note: Rates are PMJAY government package rates (ceiling). Actual hospital charges may vary within these limits.

CARD-009.package_name: Complete Heart Block — Permanent Pacemaker Implantation

includes: Mitral valve repair or bioprosthetic replacement

CARD-017.package_name: HOCM — Septal Myectomy / Alcohol Septal Ablation
includes: Surgical septal myectomy or catheter ablation

NEUR-010.package_name: Acute Subdural Hematoma — Craniotomy / Burr Hole
includes: Emergency craniotomy or burr hole evacuation

GI-004.package_name: Esophageal Variceal Bleeding — Endoscopic Band Ligation/Sclerotherapy

includes: ERCP with stone extraction or stent

GI-014.package_name: Peptic Ulcer with Perforation — Laparotomy + Repair

NEPH-015.package_name: End Stage Renal Disease — Hemodialysis Session

ORTH-004.package_name: Femur Fracture — ORIF with IM Nail/Plate

includes: Excision and primary closure or Z-plasty

HEM-002.package_name: Sickle Cell Disease Crisis — Inpatient Care

URO-007.package_name: Pyelonephritis with Abscess — Percutaneous Drainage / Surgery
includes: Percutaneous drainage or open surgical drainage

URO-014.package_name: Renal Cell Carcinoma — Radical / Partial Nephrectomy

DERM-013.package_name: Extensive Pressure Ulcer — Surgical Debridement / Skin Grafting

DERM-015.package_name: Malignant Melanoma — Wide Local Excision + SNB

excludes: Modified ECT device charges beyond package
